untranslatable_reason: This signal requires OLS regression residuals, z-score calculations on residuals, cointegration detection (ADF test), and rolling pair analysis. None of these econometric indicators (residuals, z-scores, ADF test results, cointegration status) are available in the allowed indicator set. The strategy fundamentally depends on statistical measures derived from multivariate regression analysis that cannot be expressed using only the provided technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns).
translation_notes: The signal describes an advanced pairs trading strategy using mean-reversion of OLS regression residuals with rolling z-score thresholds. This requires: (1) identification of cointegrated pairs, (2) OLS regression fitting, (3) residual extraction, (4) ADF stationarity testing, and (5) z-score normalization of residuals. These are quantitative finance techniques that exist outside the technical indicator framework. To implement this strategy, a custom indicator plugin would need to be developed to compute residuals and z-scores from cointegrated pair data.
